prompt: where were we on this? haven't looked at it in a few days

assertions.name: uses-four-section-structure
assertions.description: Response contains all four required H2 sections in order: 'Where we are', 'Scope', 'Watch out for', 'Recommended starting point'.

assertions.name: identifies-active-work-item
assertions.description: Response correctly names the active work item — feature flags, work item 001, or docs/001-feature-flags.md.

assertions.name: names-current-stage
assertions.description: Response identifies the current workflow stage as BUILD & ASSESS (or notes the user is in build/build-and-assess).

assertions.name: no-confirmation-question
assertions.description: Response does NOT ask the user to confirm the file scope, since no feature description was provided.

assertions.name: specific-recommended-starting-point
assertions.description: The 'Recommended starting point' section contains one concrete next action (a specific file, function, or test to look at) rather than a generic instruction like 'continue working on feature flags'.
